## RE-VERIFICATION CHECKLIST (all 6 fixes must be confirmed correct)

### Verify BLOCKER-1 fix (T4 BATS deadlock pattern)

Read T4 in PLAN.md. Confirm the BATS test bodies now use:
```bash
await observer({ event: { type: "pane-captured", ... } })
```
NOT the deadlock `await new Promise((resolve) => observer.onPaneCaptured(resolve))` + `handler({...})` pattern. There should be 3 @test blocks (per WARN-C fix).

### Verify BLOCKER-2 fix (T6 staging)

Read T6 in PLAN.md. Confirm the staging step now uses BOTH:
```bash
git add src/hooks/pane-monitor.ts tests/lib/hooks/ tests/scripts/tmux/55-pane-monitor-journal-capture.bats
git add -u .planning/phases/42-tmux-visual-orchestration-layer-fork-extension/UAT.md .planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/VERIFICATION.md
```

### Verify WARN-A fix (T5 P42 last line ref)

Read `.planning/phases/42-tmux-visual-orchestration-layer-fork-extension/UAT.md` last 5 lines. Confirm T5 now references the correct line/content (not a fictional "closing backtick").

### Verify WARN-B fix (T5 P43 last line ref)

Read `.planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/VERIFICATION.md` last 5 lines. Confirm T5 now references line 250 (or whatever the actual "Re-verified" line is).

### Verify WARN-C fix (3rd @test block in T4)

Confirm T4 has exactly 3 `@test` blocks now (the 3rd tests dispose semantics: pre-event written + 3 post-events NOT written = 1 total file).

### Verify WARN-D fix (Plan Notes section)

Confirm PLAN.md has a new "## Plan Notes" section explaining why 6 tasks is acceptable.
